Flag Base Description & Indoor Display Specifications

The 4 Leg Standard Flag Base provides reliable support for indoor custom flag displays. This replacement base is specifically engineered for indoor environments where wind resistance is not a primary concern.

Key Features:

  • 7-pound weight for stable indoor flag mounting
  • Four-leg design for enhanced stability
  • Compatible with standard flag pole systems
  • Designed specifically for indoor use
  • Replacement base for existing flag display systems

This flag base replacement is ideal for retail environments, trade shows, offices, and other indoor venues where custom flags need secure, stable mounting without the weight requirements of outdoor bases.

Flag Base Construction & Material Durability

Frequently Asked Questions - Flag Base

What is the weight of the 4 Leg Standard Flag Base?

The base weighs 7 pounds, providing stable support for indoor flag displays while remaining portable enough for easy repositioning.

Is this base suitable for outdoor use?

No, this base is specifically designed for indoor use. For outdoor applications, consider our heavier outdoor flag bases that provide greater wind resistance.

What flag pole sizes are compatible with this base?

The base is designed to work with standard flag pole diameters. Contact our customer service team if you have specific pole size questions.

How many bases can I order at once?

The maximum order quantity is 10 units through our online system. For larger quantities, please contact customer service for special pricing and availability.

Do you offer quantity discounts?

Yes, bulk pricing is available for quantities of 5 or more bases. Pricing is automatically calculated during checkout.

What shipping options are available?

Ground shipping is recommended due to the weight. Expedited shipping is available for urgent orders. All shipments include tracking information.
